notes: Estimator error bound: uncontrolled; upgrade tracked by ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE (GAP-2 instance). Migration batch 2 re-validated 2026-06-05: 167/167 asserts across the eight enumerated-reading scripts (LAM/HEX/FCC races, Bloch log-det, inhomogeneous Wick, dense surface, two-shell ensemble, LAM/HEX exact-Wick brackets); all regenerated artefacts identical to archive within 1e-9 (claims/B1-RH-ENUM/runs/260605-migration-revalidation/). Migration-clean: no legacy: pointers remain. INCIDENT 2026-06-06: an autonomous-agent tool-layer write truncated this card mid-string (CLAUDE.md sec-2 defect class). Restored from git HEAD plus this session's verified AddB-AddE field values (each passed lint/catalog/release/pytest at its turn). The autonomous U1-U16 notes remain on disk as UNVERIFIED DRAFTS (PDFs/linter pending) and did NOT modify this card. U-SERIES TRIAGE 2026-06-06 (useries-triage-260606-v1.0): the autonomous verification script ran 52/57 on first execution; 5 FAILs classified — 1 typo (m_w 0.0392414->0.0392407), 1 factor-2 error (M'=-J(0)/2 not -J(0); U7/U10), 1 estimate slip (U7 endpoint ratio 1.13 not 1.34, still >1), 1 x60 overclaim (near-gap remainder 1.65e-3 not 2.7e-5; U11), 1 UPHELD BLOCKER (R-U10-3: near-gap endpoint protection x2 not x100/x130). Script corrected to assert truth (v0.2.0, 57/57). CONSEQUENCE: the U1 Reading-H T6-CONDITIONAL proposal is BLOCKED-pending-repair on the near-gap small-amplitude endpoint (confirms U9 G-U1-SMALLT); x2>1 so not falsified, but too thin for promotion. Repair options registered (sharper kernel / min-amplitude restriction / explicit x2-conditional T6) — operator choice. All 16 autonomous notes now build clean PDFs (FORM-CHECK PASS, Overfull 0); zero truncation found. R-U10-3 RESOLVED 2026-06-06 (neargap-common-mode-resolution-260606-v1.0, script neargap_common_mode_repair.py 14/14): the near-gap x2 was a mis-subtraction — at fixed I the diagonal dressing r_hat(I)=rR+2lam'I is PATTERN-INDEPENDENT, so P and R_H share D_0 and F[P]-F[R_H] = (1/2)Tr[ln(D_0+lam'P^2)-ln D_0] >= 0 UNCONDITIONALLY (lam'P^2 PSD, ln operator-monotone). The convention remainder (1.65e-3) is COMMON-MODE (dressing-swap changes dF by 0.4%, x282 below the margin) and cancels. Near-gap sweep to I=1e-5: floor holds, no thinning. The U1 T6-CONDITIONAL proposal is UN-BLOCKED on the near-gap axis; B1 stays T5 pending operator sign-off; named hypotheses {H-LAYER,H-A0,H-ADM-COH,SC-SCOPE} unchanged. PROMOTED T5 -> T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} 2026-06-06 (operator-authorized, directive 'proceed with item 1'; note reading-h-t6-entry v2.0). Self-adversarial review (5 objections: case-split consistency, SC-SCOPE substantiveness, ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE, H-A0 non-circularity, enumerated-scope) — none UPHELD as blocker. STEP-5B removed from open_gates (CLOSED-CONDITIONAL; its condition H-ADM-COH carried as a named hypothesis). H-ADM-COH + SC-SCOPE registered in GATES.md this turn. H-A0 -> H-ANCHOR 2026-06-06 (operator-authorized 'proceed with item 3'): the A=0 uniqueness/zero-at-gap is now a sign-decomposition THEOREM (L1/L2/L3 closed forms + anchor inequality m*>m_w x7.76; ha0_sign_decomposition.py 14/14, G-A0-VER closed); hypothesis strictly weakened, quadrature-scheme dependence + 5.5e-3 systematic removed from the load-bearing chain. Residual G-A0-DUI (DUI regularity, textbook). No tier-number change; the theorem strengthens. G-A0-DUI CLOSED + H-ANCHOR DEMOTED 2026-06-06 (operator-authorized clean finish, 'proceed with 1'): differentiation under the integral written out (dominated convergence, dominating function k^2/[m0+C(k^2-q0^2)^2]^2 integrable; ha0_sign_decomposition.py v1.1.0 23/23). With L1 rigorous and L2/L3 closed-form, A=0 uniqueness is UNCONDITIONAL at mu^2=0.005, resting only on the verified facts m*>m_w (x7.76) and M_R>M_c (x4.12). H-ANCHOR is thus a VERIFIED DEPENDENCY, not a hypothesis, and is removed from the hypothesis set; the off-anchor neighbourhood remains ROBUSTNESS-MU2. ROBUSTNESS-MU2 ADVANCED (not closed) 2026-06-06 (operator 'proceed with 3'; robustness-mu2-offanchor v1.0, robustness_mu2_sweep.py 9/9): the sign-decomposition lemmas are mu^2-independent (structural), and the anchor inequalities m*>m_w / M_R>M_c hold on mu^2 in [0.001,0.05] (x0.2..x10; min ratios 5.74/4.08 across x4); m*-m_w = 3uM_R+15v(M_R^2-M_c^2) cancels mu^2. lambda' drifts only 1.5% across x4 so the STEP-5B/layer margins are numerically supported off-anchor. RESIDUAL (gate stays OPEN): exact off-anchor STEP-5B re-margin. The A=0-uniqueness component of ROBUSTNESS-MU2 is settled. ROBUSTNESS-MU2 CLOSED 2026-06-06 (operator 'proceed with 1'; robustness-mu2-step5b-remargin v1.0, robustness_mu2_step5b_remargin.py 5/5): STEP-5B closure margin ratio recomputed off-anchor (only J_eff integral; rest closed-form) stays >1 across mu^2 in [x0.5,x2] x all 3 intensities (worst x2.55 endpoint, production ~x59; margins monotone increasing in mu^2 so anchor near thinnest; anchor reproduces AddE x59.4/x2.6). Layer margin m bounded positive via preserved P_B floor (M_R/M_c>4.1, <2% constant drift => <60% m drop excluded, cannot break x2.55). Combined with the A=0 uniqueness robustness (x0.2..x10), ROBUSTNESS-MU2 closes for [x0.5,x2]; removed from open_gates. 4-objection self-adversarial review (anchor-m, J-resolution, neighbourhood-width, overstate-B1), none upheld. OPERATOR REVIEW 2026-06-06: SC-SCOPE all-orders lift OPEN until ALL of M-ENDPOINT (convexity-honest endpoint variance), GHAT3-Q0 (optional), GHAT4-PERTRANSFER (per-transfer quartic-difference form factor), and R-U6-1 (tadpole formal alignment) are completed and re-assembled as a JOINT 2nd+3rd-order inequality; at sup-kernel grade the endpoint third-order lift fails (sunset x0.97, quartic-difference x1.0). The B1 T6 selection SIGN rests on the COMPOSED margin (not the full floor) and is unaffected; only the SC-SCOPE removal (all-orders) needs these inputs. No tier change. CORRECTION 2026-06-06 (operator adversarial review of the H-A0 docs): ROBUSTNESS-MU2 RE-OPENED. The previous [x0.5,x2] 'closure' rested on the exact layer margin m(mu^2) being bounded-not-recomputed, which does not meet the adversarial bar; reclassified to a numerically-supported ADVANCE (gate OPEN). ANCHOR DEPENDENCY RETAINED AS VERIFIED FACT: m*>m_w (x7.76) and M_R>M_c (x4.12) under A1-KERNEL-CONV at mu^2=0.005 -- not erased, tracked in GATES (H-ANCHOR verified-fact row). H-A0 is DISCHARGED AT THE PRODUCTION ANCHOR mu^2=0.005 ONLY; full mu^2-interval removal is NOT claimed. RECONCILED 2026-06-06 (operator robustness review, more specific than the H-A0-docs note): ROBUSTNESS-MU2 = SCOPED CLOSURE CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT (NOT unconditional, NOT all-order). Mandatory qualifier carried: the exact layer margin m(mu^2) is bounded positive, not explicitly recomputed; monotonicity is a sampled-sweep observation. SC-SCOPE all-orders lift remains OPEN. Removed from open_gates as a scoped closure. FINAL ROBUSTNESS-MU2 = OPEN (operator review 2026-06-06, explicit): all earlier 'CLOSED'/'scoped closure' wordings WITHDRAWN. The gate carries numerically-supported off-anchor advance only (STEP-5B margins recomputed on [x0.5,x2]; A=0 uniqueness on [x0.2,x10]); m(mu^2) is bounded but NOT recomputed, so it does not meet the closure bar. ROBUSTNESS-MU2 restored to open_gates. ROBUSTNESS-MU2 CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT 2026-06-07 (operator authorization, reviews/2026-06-07-robustness-close-authorization-review.md): closure bar met by robustness-mu2-margin-recompute v1.1 (9/9) -- exact m(mu^2)=PB(M_+)-DIP_BAND, min 0.945 m_anchor, derivative-sign min certificate at mu^2=0.0025, full-grid J_eff envelope <0.01%, worst STEP-5B ratio x2.41; scope second-cumulant order, three certified intensities, [x0.5,x2]; removed from open_gates. M-ENDPOINT RESOLVED (sunset axis positive x1.13); SC-SCOPE stays OPEN on GHAT4-PERTRANSFER + R-U6-1. SC-SCOPE SCOPE DECISION 2026-06-07 (operator-authorized, scscope-scope-decision v1.0): the all-orders third-order lift is ESTIMATE-FEASIBLE (estimate-grade, not proved) for I<=1e-3 (paired joint x3.1) and SECOND-CUMULANT scope is ACCEPTED at the I=2e-3 endpoint (per-transfer + joint-pairing exhausted, paired x0.905; sunset alone x1.076 near-saturating; NG-2026-06-07-scscope-endpoint-joint). B1 T6 UNCHANGED -- SC-SCOPE is the named second-cumulant hypothesis, so the endpoint acceptance is the hypothesis, not a new concession. ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE OPERATOR REVIEW 2026-06-07 (reviews/2026-06-07-estimator-upgrade-and-scscope-acceptance-review.md): the single-shell enumerated margins (LAM/HEX/FCC/BCC at mu^2=0.005) are CONTROLLED-ERROR w.r.t. the dominant M-quadrature knob (curvature kappa_R = dF_R''(0) >= 0.85, binding LAM 0.851 +/- 1.7e-5; no condensate at N_PT 6000 & 20000; M-quadrature envelope < 0.1% of kappa). Operator verdict: KEEP OPEN, mark the single-shell M-quadrature SUBGATE as controlled-error advanced. The gate STAYS OPEN -- the margins are controlled w.r.t. the M-quadrature knob ONLY (NOT a full estimator closure); two-shell ensemble + dI/amplitude-grid knobs remain, and a no-condensate interval/Lipschitz continuum bound is a publication-grade follow-up (T-010). No tier/gate flip. ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE KNOB CLOSURE 2026-06-07 (estimator-upgrade-knobs v1.0, estimator_upgrade_knobs.py 13/13): the single-shell enumerated margins are now controlled-error against ALL THREE numerical knobs (M-quadrature from enumerated v1.0; dI-quadrature kappa-envelope <0.1% under (6000,50)->(12000,100); amplitude-grid no-condensate grid-monotone at NG=121/241/481), the no-condensate verdict is upgraded to a curvature-chord CONTINUUM lower bound (positive on every A>0 interval for LAM/HEX/FCC/BCC -- no inter-node condensate), and the two-shell {110}+{200} (0,0) Hessian is certified positive-definite with controlled error (kappa_12=0 by shell orthogonality; soft eigenvalue = single-shell BCC curvature 5.116; {200} kernel penalty C q0^4=0.214>0). The two-shell GLOBAL no-condensate remains Math432 exact-Wick grid evidence (a continuum bound over the (A1,A2) surface is the named residual). No tier/gate flip; ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE stays OPEN pending the two-shell global continuum bound + operator sign-off. RESULTS-LEDGER R-016.
title: Reading-H selection within enumerated condensate ensembles
statement: Reading-H is selected among all admissible competitors of the H-ADM-COH amended class: $F_{\rm total}[P] > F_{\rm total}[R_H]$ at matched second-cumulant scope. Proof = case split — bulk via the layer margin (Proposition A, $m=+4.32\times10^{-3}$) plus the beyond-layer bound (STEP-5B closure, floors $\times59.4/\times8.8/\times2.6$); near-gap small-amplitude via the structural floor $F_{\rm fluct}[P]-F_{\rm fluct}[R_H]=\tfrac12\mathrm{Tr}[\ln(D_0+\lambda'P^2)-\ln D_0]\ge0$ (R-001/R-U10-3, unconditional). The T6 statement is the selection SIGN; quantitative margins remain estimator-grade (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE).
scope: T6 CONDITIONAL on {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} (operator-authorized 2026-06-06, directive 'proceed with item 1'). Class-wide over the H-ADM-COH amended class; second-cumulant order; selection SIGN only. NOT unconditional (H-ADM-COH; unrestricted = DR-2 research-grade), NOT all-orders (SC-SCOPE substantive — third-cumulant endpoint marginal), NOT a precise-margin claim (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE), mu^2-robust on [x0.5,x2] at second-cumulant order (ROBUSTNESS-MU2 CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT), not all-orders. ROBUSTNESS-MU2 CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT (exact m(mu^2) recomputed: min 0.945 m_anchor, derivative-sign min certificate at mu^2=0.0025, full-grid J_eff envelope <0.01%) for mu^2 in [x0.5,x2]: the selection is robust on this neighbourhood (STEP-5B margins x2.55..x60 recomputed off-anchor; A=0 uniqueness robust x0.2..x10; Prop-A floor preserved M_R/M_c>4.1). No longer strictly pinned to the exact anchor.
falsifier: An admissible competitor of the H-ADM-COH class with F_total <= F_total[R_H]; a near-gap section with the structural floor < 0; or the loss of any named hypothesis {H-LAYER, H-A0, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE}.
no_overclaim: T6 is the selection SIGN modulo four NAMED hypotheses, not an unconditional or all-orders result. SC-SCOPE is substantive (third-cumulant endpoint marginal); the precise margins are estimator-grade (ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE open); mu^2-robustness CLOSED@[x0.5,x2]-2ND-CUMULANT at second-cumulant order (ROBUSTNESS-MU2), not all-orders. The unrestricted-class selection is the DR-2 route (research-grade). No tier action on B5 (T5-CANDIDATE) by this note. TIER-LOGIC (operator review 2026-06-06): B1's T6 CONSUMES B5 / STEP-5B as the NAMED HYPOTHESIS H-ADM-COH (the amended-class closure condition / scope pin), NOT as a proved unconditional theorem -- this is what keeps B1 (T6) consistent with B5 (T5) under TSv2 §4.4 (a T6 claim may rest on a sub-T6 input promoted to a named hypothesis). B1 T6 reads: 'IF {H-LAYER, H-ADM-COH, SC-SCOPE} hold, then Reading-H is selected at matched second-cumulant scope.' B5 is never consumed here as an unconditional theorem.
next_action: SC-SCOPE all-orders lift (per-transfer third-cumulant endpoint kernels); ESTIMATOR-UPGRADE (controlled-error quantitative margins); standing operator decisions B5 full-T5 + H-A0->H-ANCHOR remain.
